name: Organon & Co.
business: Organon & Co. is a global healthcare company with a mission to deliver impactful medicines and solutions for a healthier every day. With a portfolio of over 70 products across women’s health and general medicines, which includes biosimilars, Organon focuses on addressing health needs that uniquely, disproportionately or differently affect women, while expanding access to essential treatments in over 140 countries and territories.
sellsTo: managed healthcare providers such as health maintenance organizations, pharmacy benefit managers and other institutions

exposures.sentence: Our women's health portfolio of products is sold by prescription primarily in two therapeutic areas: contraception and fertility.
Jada is intended to provide control and treatment of abnormal postpartum uterine bleeding or hemorrhage when conservative management is warranted.

Cyberattacks affecting our IT systems could result in exposure of confidential information, the modification of critical data or the disruption of our worldwide operations, including manufacturing and sales operations.
The use of artificial intelligence (AI) and its legislative and regulatory landscape continues to evolve and makes it difficult to fully understand and assess related risks.

catalysts.event: Divestiture of Jada System to Laborie
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we divested the Jada System to Laborie for an aggregate payment of up to $465 million, comprised of consideration of $440 million, subject to certain closing adjustments, plus potential earnout payments of up to $25 million based on the achievement of certain 2026 net sales targets.

catalysts.event: FDA approval of five-year duration-of-use for Nexplanon
catalysts.sentence: An application for a five-year duration-of-use indication was approved by the FDA in January 2026.

catalysts.event: Submission of five-year duration-of-use application for Nexplanon to EU and UK Health Authorities
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we submitted a similar application for a five-year duration period of use to the EU and UK Health Authorities.

catalysts.event: Regulatory submission for Mercilon for dysmenorrhea to Japan's PMDA
catalysts.sentence: We made a regulatory submission for the same indication to Japan’s Pharmaceutical and Medical Device Agency (the PMDA) in July 2025.

catalysts.event: Discontinuation of OG-6219 clinical development program
catalysts.sentence: On July 2, 2025, we announced that the Phase 2 ELENA proof-of-concept study evaluating OG-6219 in endometriosis-related pain did not meet its primary efficacy endpoint.

catalysts.event: Discontinuation of OG-7191 clinical development program
catalysts.sentence: On December 15, 2025, we determined that the profile of OG-7191 was no longer suitable for development, and made the decision to discontinue all activities for this program.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of U.S. rights to Tofidence from Biogen
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we acquired from Biogen the regulatory and commercial rights in the United States for Tofidence, a biosimilar to Actemra (tocilizumab), for intravenous infusion.

catalysts.event: Launch of Bildyos and Bilprevda biosimilars in the United States
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we launched Bildyos injection 60 mg/mL and Bilprevda injection 120 mg/1.7 mL, biosimilars to Prolia (denosumab) and Xgeva (denosumab), respectively, in the United States.
The FDA approved our BLA for HLX11 in November 2025.

catalysts.event: Notice of termination of Cirqle Biomedical agreement
catalysts.sentence: We delivered a notice of termination of this agreement to Cirqle on February 9, 2026, setting an effective date of termination for the agreement of May 10, 2026.

catalysts.event: Reduction of regular quarterly dividend by 90%
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we reduced our regular quarterly dividend by 90%.

catalysts.event: Declaration of quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share
catalysts.sentence: On February 12, 2026, our Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.02 for each issued and outstanding share of our common stock.

catalysts.event: Expected launch of HLX11 in the United States
catalysts.sentence: the Company intends to launch HLX11 in the United States in late 2028.
